title: Sneak Indicator
description: Simple UI element showing whether you're currently sneaking.
body:
Simple UI element showing whether you're currently sneaking. Currently uses the built-in icon for the Slowness potion effect.

~~UI is highly compatible with Roundaround's sprint indicator.~~
The UI element can be placed wherever you want it to be placed on screen. The config menu for it is not a menu, it just closes the menu and lets you use your movement inputs to move the icon.
